name: coldclone
description: Host-side gauntlet for fetching, scanning, and sanitizing untrusted repositories before any agent, editor, or toolchain opens them.

interface.shortDescription: Sanitize untrusted repos before opening them.
interface.longDescription: Coldclone is a host-side gauntlet for untrusted code. It performs a hardened fetch, scans lockfiles for known-malicious dependencies, quarantines auto-execution and agent prompt-injection surfaces, and refuses structurally unsafe trees before any editor, agent, or toolchain opens them.
defaultPrompt: Use Coldclone to prep this untrusted repo URL.
Sanitize this extracted ZIP folder with Coldclone.
Check whether this Coldclone tree is still inert.
